description_long: This is a full-face motorcycle helmet with a sleek, aerodynamic shape and a glossy black finish. The helmet features a large, gold-tinted visor that covers the entire front, providing ample facial protection and visibility. Distinctive flame-like gray graphics adorn the sides and back, adding a bold, aggressive visual flair. There are visible circular ventilation ports on each side, likely for airflow and comfort, and a prominent vent or exhaust at the rear. The surface appears hard and smooth, typical of polycarbonate or fiberglass construction, with metallic accents on the vents. The interior is not visible, but it is likely padded for comfort and impact absorption.
description: A glossy black full-face helmet with a gold visor and flame graphics, featuring side vents and a rear exhaust.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large gold-tinted visor dominating the face, with a central vent below and a smooth, glossy black surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular side vent, flame graphics, and the curvature of the helmet shell.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flame motif extending across the back, a prominent rear exhaust vent, and a small circular emblem.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side vent, flame graphics, and the gold visor wrapping around.
attribute_brand_logo: A small circular emblem is visible on the front and rear of the helmet, featuring a stylized letter or symbol, but no recognizable brand name.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two circular side vents, one on each side, and a prominent rear exhaust vent; all vents are round and metallic.
attribute_graphic_design: Flame motif in gray on a black background, with no text; the design is bold and aggressive.
